description: CompositionCharcoal grey trousers made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, one small coin pocket on the right, belt loops on waistband, applique brand tab on the right hip pocket, stitch detailing and a button and zipper closureFitSlim fitWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these trousers from basics are made of cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette.Model statisticsThe product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
